rules: No secrets, tokens, full account numbers, private family details, or raw chat dumps.
GitHub stores durable decisions and protocol; chat stores runtime coordination.
Use unknown instead of unverifiable status.
Every meaningful handoff records state, judgment, and next trigger.
Every Slack work thread must close as KEEP, KILL, PIVOT, WAIT, or PROMOTE.
Only promoted judgments move from Slack to Wiki, Skill, or Memory.
